creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Well, not so easy.

I've just downgraded Hugo to the previous version in the website builder due to rendering issues with the old status reports, such as duplicated menus.

I believe the issue is related to this:
https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/issues/11999
Further investigation is needed.

For now, the redirect looping has stopped, but we need to resolve this issue to stay aligned with the upstream version of Hugo.
